header.label: Teacher Comparison Analytics
header.headline: 51% female teachers nationally — State Govt schools hold 61% of teacher deficit
header.sub: In 2020-21: 97 L total teachers, 51% female. Teachers required for PTR 30: 98.6T. Redeployable excess: 90.2T.

cards.label: Total Teachers
cards.fullLabel: Total Teaching Workforce
cards.headline: 97 L
cards.headlineNote: Total teachers nationally
cards.note: Male 47.5 L + Female 49.5 L = 97 L. Female share: 51%

cards.label: Teachers Required (PTR 30)
cards.fullLabel: Additional teachers needed for PTR ≤ 30
cards.headline: 98.6T
cards.headlineNote: Teachers needed to achieve PTR ≤ 30
cards.note: 98.6T new teachers required. 90.2T excess teachers can be redeployed to close 91% of the gap

cards.label: Female Teachers — Secondary
cards.fullLabel: Female teacher share at Secondary level
cards.headlineNote: Female teacher share at Secondary stage
cards.note: Female teacher representation increases at higher school categories — 52% at Secondary vs 50% at Foundational

cards.label: State Govt Teacher Deficit
cards.fullLabel: State Government share of teacher deficit
cards.headline: 59.9T
cards.headlineNote: Teachers required in State Govt schools
cards.barLabel: 61% of national deficit is in State Govt schools
cards.note: State Government schools account for 61% of the national teacher deficit — the largest single contributor

2020-21.chartGenderCatSource: Female teacher share by school category — representation improves at higher school levels, with Secondary schools having the highest female teacher proportion.
2020-21.chartGenderCatNote: Female teacher share is highest at Secondary (52%) and lowest at Foundational (50%) stage.
2020-21.chartDeficitMgmtSource: Teacher deficit (teachers required to achieve PTR 30) by management type — State Government schools carry the largest share of unfilled teaching positions.
2020-21.chartDeficitMgmtNote: State Government schools require 59.9T additional teachers — 61% of the national deficit — due to their large share of total enrollment.

insight1.label: Total Teaching Workforce
insight1.note: 49.5 L female (51%) and 47.5 L male teachers across all school types in 2020-21

insight2.label: Teachers Required
insight2.note: Achieving PTR 30 requires 98.6T additional teachers. 90.2T excess teachers are redeployable.
